---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | Image, Value Normalization"
image: social-cards/image-normalization.png
---

# 🏗️ Value Normalization {#sec-image-normalization}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## Value Normalization
:::

WIP

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
